twitch_info.title: I wanna kill the kamilia 3 - Secret 5 - Attempts - PB: Screen 9 of 9 - You know the drill (#2) (vid 9)

message.body: your dedication is inspiring! I really want you to get this
Yeah, I really want to as well.
But I honestly don't mind how long it takes anymore.
I'll even do 100+ hours if I have to.
if I take over 100 hours on this, it will have been longer than how long secret 1 entrance took me in total lmao
Secret 1 entrance was the hardest thing for me in this game
It's just a game of watching the hour counter go up at this point, honestly.
at least you reached p4 for the first time, that's great.
and the next unexpected thing is getting past p4
you'll see what I mean probably
Understanding the pattern and executing it are different things.
but i know what to do
i just messed up a jump
up that to 10 times of jum pmess ups or more
and you know how I felt.
I thought it was easy as well at first.
But turns out it really wasn't
i feel like this is the second boss i'll beat
It did eventually become easy again but that was much further down the line.
unironically it's the 2nnd easiest pattern to me
Max believes p4 and p5 are the hardest phases iirc
it's not hard per se, but you mess it up constantly.
p5 is just monka and p6 is "Maybe the clear?"
hardest phase for me was the third one honestly
I lost so many attempts to phase 4 though
So I was always like "please" to phase 5
At least it's not EX Emperor.
The phase 4 in that looks genuinely scary.

The big crux of K3 bosses

even if i'm not 100% focusing i keep you sane c:
Even though I haven't had a single screen 9 attempt in 6 hours, and more not streamed I believe today.
It's been a good grind ngl
i'm glad you're being consistent at screen 7 :D
you will do it i believe in you :3
man I am getting better at screen 7
In practice I find 8 through 9 much easier than 7 through 9
So I just need to somehow get that attained here
somehow get my good 7, and get my good 8 through 9
I'm also really happy that since yesterday's stream, I can do screen 6 so often.
It used to take hours for me to get past screen 6 like 4 times.
it will barely take mme a hour
but now screen 6 is much easier than it used to be
Ever since I learnt that you heavy tap the arrow key to go into the 16 px gap
which is crazy because you'd think you have to hold
it's a pretty easy 16px when you think about it
once you know about the heavy tap
if you don't know about the heavy tap
then god have mercy on your soul
I only learnt it as of yesterday
but you can see the results
it's one strong tap then stop
and I sadly did not know about that until yesterday
I was holding and then letting go
i wasn't even focusing about how you were doing it
I should've done the heavy tap
you were doing a stuter like movement right ?
It was more that I'd time the arrow key press
yeah idk how to describe it
and then let go on the timing
I guess it was similar to stuttering for the end step
But yeah it was a terrible strategy
I was wondering why I kept overshooting more often than not.
Had I just did the heavy tap, my only risk would've been undershooting due to going too far left on first jump.
Which would've meant I almost always get it
rather than never get it lmao
well better know now than 10 hours later
But the fact I figured it out myself makes me quite happy.
Because it means I'm starting to make the adjustments that I do for timemachine 2 lunatic, in regular IWBTG fangames.
